title: koeleria seminuda
intro: Koeleria seminuda, also known as the little bluegrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Koeleria seminuda is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
